title: Dalam Pelukan Waktu
description: On the day of his daughter’s wedding, Sumarna, a father who had raised Indah on his own since she was a child found himself facing a moment for which he had never been prepared: letting her go. During the short journey to the venue, the silence and their quiet conversations gradually revealed the vulnerability they had kept so tightly hidden all this time. Through their nervousness, light-hearted laughter, and the tears that finally flowed, the two acknowledged to one another a love that would never fade.

title: A Musicians Requiem
description: Jason, an ordinary college student with dreams of becoming an indie musician recognized for his work, is deeply committed to his artistic vision. His idealism, however, is a double-edged sword; it gives him resilience and a strong sense of responsibility toward his craft, yet it also costs him his relationship and his closest friendship. As Jason continues his pursuit, he begins to realize just how difficult it truly is to create music that resonates with many people

title: Mr Darmo The Essentric
description: A group of freshmen history students, who are currently being introduced to university life, expect that college will be as beautiful, comfortable, and straightforward as they imagine. But it’s not that simple, my friend. There exists an anomaly a slick, boomer-era lecturer with a phenomenal background: intelligent yet mischievous, moody, and downright weird. This becomes a challenge for the history students a mix of threat, pressure, entertainment, and amusement for those with different personalities

title: Tertutup Rapat
description: When she visits her childhood home, Uma is confronted with bad memories of her family. But it is there that the truth is revealed, and she begins to learn to make peace with her past.
A teenage girl who experiences terrible terror in her boarding house after having a nightmare, but it was all in a dream. until then she woke up and experienced the same thing as the nightmare

title: Waktika
description: A female student is unable to accept the fact that she is now entering her final week in high school. She cannot accept it because, in her opinion, life after high school is a time filled with many things she has never thought about before.
